name: HARSH.
short_description: The agressive, heavy, frantic and HARSH. roguelite. Blast metal and agressive electronic music. Your dash is the only way to switch guns.
detailed_description:
HECTIC.
FRANTIC.
HARSH.

Combining the tropes and skills of action roguelikes, HARSH. gives it a twist by limiting your mechanics to your dash.

DASH TO CHANGE BETWEEN GUNS

SLASH TO HEAL

CHOOSE AND BUY BUFFS TO MAXIMIZE

Fight hordes of enemies and bosses while blasting metal, breakcore and hardcore infused original music that takes the experience to the next level. Beat your highscore. Finish in your best time.

THIS GAME CONTAINS:


  • 5 GUNS.
  • 30+ BUFFS.
  • 5 BOSSES.
  • 13 SONGS.
  • DOGS.
